Video.summary: Shawn only wants folks who are willing to be honest about their struggles because it shows you can be fearless. Everyone deserves a happy life...but he can only help you if you're ready to take a chance on yourself. In this episode, the candidates have to sell themselves. They have to tell Shawn their story because he wants to know how you got stuck...but more importantly, they have to convince him they won’t give up...no matter how hard it is to hang on, or take a leap of faith.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions
Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions
Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Video.summary: If you had a chance to close Shawn, could you get it done? Today's the day we see who has the goods. Each team has one goal. Get the contract signed. Shawn is not going to make it easy, but often your audience isn't the hardest part. Sometimes getting out of your own way is the biggest challenge. Prepare to witness a pitch fest for the ages. You'll see that it doesn't matter what you're selling - a Yacht, a Ferrari, a Private Jet...or a Potato - if you don't connect with Shawn, you have no chance.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face
Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face
Millionaire Maker - Punch Me In The Face

Video.summary: The rise of guru Bhagwan and his model commune in Poona and oregon in the 1970s & 1980s told by his former close disciples, his personal secretary and bodyguard. A spiritual journey to the depths and shallows of the human soul.
Video.title: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Image.alt: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD

Video.summary: Part heart-pounding adventure, part spiritual quest, THE HIGHEST PASS, a feature length documentary, premiered in Los Angeles to sold out audiences. The award-winning film shares the journey of seven seekers, including one who has never ridden a motorcycle, who follow a guru with a Vedic death prophecy on a moto journey up to the highest pass of the Indian Himalayas. Over 21 days and up to an elevation of 18,000 feet along a winding road, they never let low oxygen, altitude sickness, river-flooded roads, icy edges, snow and loaded trucks dampen their spirits or, ultimately, their deeper selves.
Video.title: The Highest Pass

Image.alt: The Highest Pass
The Highest Pass

Video.summary: The Mark Morris Dance Group works with Parkinson's patients.
Video.title: Capturing Grace

Image.alt: Capturing Grace
Capturing Grace

Video.summary: How often do men really think about sex? Plus, we talk about ways to maintain intimacy when you're both the caretaker and the lover.
Video.title: Sex Talk - How Often Do Men Think About Sex?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - How Often Do Men Think About Sex?
Sex Talk - How Often Do Men Think About Sex?
Sex Talk - How Often Do Men Think About Sex?

Video.summary: Alcohol may help get you in the mood but how does it affect your sex life? And do men fake orgasms? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Fake Orgasms: Bad for Women & Men

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Fake Orgasms: Bad for Women & Men
Sex Talk - Fake Orgasms: Bad for Women & Men
Sex Talk - Fake Orgasms: Bad for Women & Men

Video.summary: 1963 Playboy Icon and Cosby Survivor, Victoria Valentino, shares her journey of overcoming unimaginable circumstances leading her to activism and purpose. Plus, one man's heroic efforts to save a tiny, unconscious life, and fun street interviews from NYC.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma
Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma
Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma

Video.summary: 3x GRAMMY winner, J. Ivy, shares his transformation from a shy kid to a spoken word powerhouse. J. Ivy performs. Plus, a story about a bus driver who made a first grader's day, street interviews from NYC, and Daaji discusses the soul's evolution.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside
Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside
Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside

Video.summary: Sharon Lechter, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Lisa Nichols, Dr.Rev Michael Beckwith, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter

Image.alt: World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter
World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter
World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Marci Shimoff.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Marci Shimoff

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Marci Shimoff
The Aware Show - Marci Shimoff
The Aware Show - Marci Shimoff

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Laura Kunces and Cory Greenberg on the topic of Human Powered Health
Video.title: The Aware Show - Human Powered Health

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Human Powered Health
The Aware Show - Human Powered Health
The Aware Show - Human Powered Health

Video.title: The Aware Show - Faust Ruggiero

Video.summary: We speak with experts about how to protect yourself from medical gaslighting, and other things you should know before you visit a doctor or dentist.
Video.title: Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It

Image.alt: Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It
Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It
Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It

Video.summary: Nutrition expert Dr. Thunder Jalili joins us to discuss why Americans spend more than $30 billion a year on dietary supplements, despite decades of research disputing their ability to improve health outcomes.
Video.title: The Truth About Vitamins

Image.alt: The Truth About Vitamins
The Truth About Vitamins
The Truth About Vitamins

Video.summary: Dr. Robert Gabbay, chief scientific and medical officer of the American Diabetes Association, speaks with us about new preventative drugs and devices for diabetes patients, and how much progress has been made in the path towards a cure.
Video.title: Diabetes: The Path to a Cure

Image.alt: Diabetes: The Path to a Cure
Diabetes: The Path to a Cure
Diabetes: The Path to a Cure

Video.summary: In our medical technology episode, we explore how patients can use mobile apps to monitor and treat chronic conditions, discuss the positive and negative effects of video games on children, and look at how robotic pets are being used to assist people with dementia.
Video.title: Inside the Latest Health Technology

Image.alt: Inside the Latest Health Technology
Inside the Latest Health Technology
Inside the Latest Health Technology

Video.summary: Did you know a large part of your immune system resides in your gut? Our gut microbiome plays a huge role in our overall health but oftentimes have been overlooked as nothing but a digestive workhorse.
Video.title: Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More

Image.alt: Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More
Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More
Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More

Video.summary: Dawa explores whether your mind controls you or you control your mind, as well as, how mindfulness can erase negative thinking and bad habits.
Video.title: Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips

Image.alt: Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips
Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips
Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips

Video.summary: Your Day 1 practice offers an invitation to slow down and take stock.
Video.title: Yoga For All Day 1: Notice

Image.alt: Yoga For All Day 1: Notice
Yoga For All Day 1: Notice
Yoga For All Day 1: Notice

Video.summary: Your Day 2 session invites you to use the tools of the at-home yoga practice to befriend your body and your breath. Build on the art of noticing from Day 1 as we expand our vocabulary with a focus on a strong foundation. This session encourages a healthy flow of energy up and down the spine and lovingly guides you to learn how to take responsibility for your experience on the mat.
Video.title: Day 2: Befriend

Image.alt: Day 2: Befriend
Day 2: Befriend
Day 2: Befriend

Video.summary: Your day 3 practice invites you to get to know your body through the structure of the practice and the art of aligning. We build on day 1 and 2 with a focus on action and alignment through asana and energy.
Video.title: Day 3: Align

Image.alt: Day 3: Align
Day 3: Align
Day 3: Align

Video.summary: Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker is a new series that shows you what you're really worth. Shawn is confident he could pluck anyone - no matter their background or experience - and turn them into a 7-figure earner...IF, they have the right attitude and drive. This series is about Shawn selecting who he will mentor and teach to reach a level of success they never thought possible. Welcome to the toughest job interview of your life. In this episode, Shawn meets the contestants and immediately finds out who's actually willing to fight for the life they want.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight
Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight
Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Video.summary: This is it. A winner will be chosen. The decision is FINAL...But we still have a crowd of candidates that each think they will be the one. Now comes a test of mental toughness. It's all come down to these final moments. Who can convince Shawn that they won't give up when things get...painful. What would you endure for a chance at greatness?...Watch the season finale of Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet

Image.alt: Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet
Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet
Millionaire Maker - No Time For Cold Feet
